name: RecoveryManager Plus
banner: RecoveryManager Plus criteria are pending official source verification. Please provide the official Health Check Criteria txt file.

criteria.text: RecoveryManager Plus service is running under a dedicated service account

criteria.text: RecoveryManager Plus is on the latest available build

criteria.text: Backup retention policy meets organizational requirements
